sections.title: Health Clinic
sections.subtitle: A conversation about registering at a new health clinic

questions.question: Patient name: _______
questions.explanation: The patient's name is David Chen.|患者名字是David Chen。

questions.question: Date of birth: 15 _______ 1985
questions.explanation: Date of birth is 15 March 1985.|出生日期是1985年3月15日。

questions.question: Address: 10 _______ Road
questions.explanation: He lives at 10 Park Road.|他住在公园路10号。

questions.question: Phone number: _______
What is the reason for registration?
questions.explanation: He recently moved to the city.|他最近搬到这个城市。

questions.question: NHS number: _______
questions.explanation: His NHS number is NH472901.|他的NHS号码是NH472901。

questions.question: Previous doctor's address: _______
questions.explanation: His previous doctor was in Manchester.|他之前的医生在曼彻斯特。

questions.question: Which doctor does he prefer?
questions.explanation: He chose Dr. Lee as his preferred doctor.|他选择Lee医生作为他的首选医生。

questions.question: Appointment time: _______ PM
questions.explanation: His appointment is at 2:30 PM.|预约时间为下午2:30。

questions.question: Medical history note: _______
questions.explanation: He has a history of asthma.|他有哮喘病史。
